creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 212862
update fetchmail + fetchmailconf to 6.4.3-rc1

Hi Corey,

the attached patch
* updates fetchmail and fetchmailconf to 6.4.3-rc1
* removes the now-obsolete patch for fetchmailconf
* switches the distfiles from .xz to .lz (saves 3 kB, and GNU lobbies for preferring lzip over xz)
